title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Aliens Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Aliens Group
jsonLd.description:
Aliens Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!
